executive-context.description: Load Mi architecture, owner context boundaries, current reports, and decision constraints before work.

safe-coding.description: Plan and apply code changes through Mi's patch safety model.

qa-security.description: Run verification, dependency checks, and security review before declaring work done.

connector-ops.description: Operate visibility connectors, action layer, remote devices, and business integrations safely.

release-readiness.description: Produce concise release evidence and readiness summaries for owner-facing decisions.

whatsapp-runtime.description: Operate WhatsApp API, key manager, store, gateway contracts, and approval impact safely.

visibility-runtime.description: Operate Universal Visibility cache, connector registry, platform health, and dashboard freshness.

daily-work-automation.description: Operate daily action workflows with approval, audit trail, rollback, and owner-facing summaries.

compliance-knowledge.description: Operate compliance knowledge ingestion, search quality, source boundaries, and evidence reporting.

remote-control-runtime.description: Operate remote access, trusted devices, command history, and remote execution safety.
